scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd backend && PORT=3298 npx tsx server.ts" "cd frontend && VITE_PORT=5198 VITE_API_PORT=3298 npx vite --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && PORT=3298 npx tsx server.ts
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && VITE_PORT=5198 VITE_API_PORT=3298 npx vite --host 0.0.0.0
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
